title: Caramelized Spanish Chestnut Stir-fry
description: A high-protein-friendly dish featuring bitter and crispy cooked chestnuts that are caramelized in a one-pot cooking method, perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add oil to the skillet and swirl it around to coat evenly. Once hot, add onion and garlic. Stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes until translucent.
Stir in tomato paste and continue cooking for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Gradually pour chicken broth or water into the pan while continuously stirring to create a sauce consistency.
Season with herbs de provence and salt. Let it simmer for about 5-7 minutes until thickened slightly.
Gently add chestnuts in batches if necessary, as they can be difficult to stir without breaking. Stir occasionally until evenly caramelized (about 10-12 minutes).
Remove from heat and serve hot.
